bills.title: Clean Energy Transformation Act (CETA)
bills.source: RCW 19.405 codified text via web search reconstruction
bills.notes: Full codified text of RCW Chapter 19.405. Includes all sections (19.405.010 through 19.405.190). Retrieved via web search since OpenStates API was blocked by sandbox proxy.

bills.title: Virginia Clean Economy Act (VCEA)
bills.notes: All Virginia legislative text hosting domains blocked by sandbox network proxy. File contains bill overview from web search summaries and URLs for manual retrieval.

bills.title: Energy Transition Act
bills.notes: All New Mexico legislative text hosting domains blocked by sandbox network proxy. File contains URLs for manual retrieval. Note: enrolled version is PDF only at nmlegis.gov; introduced HTML version available but may differ from final.

nextSteps: For VA and NM bills: visit the recommendedUrl in a browser, copy the full enrolled text, and paste it into the corresponding -raw.txt file (replacing the placeholder text after the paste marker). Then run the annotation tool at /annotate to extract promises.
